name: Cocktail Run
description: Cocktail Run is a 2D pixel platformer built for quick arcade fun. Run, jump, and dodge dangerous spikes or shooting plants to reach the finish line safely. Collect coins along the way to unlock unique character skins in the shop, and grab your daily rewards. Fully optimized for both PC and mobile devices.
instructions: PC Use A D or Left Right Arrow keys to move and Space W or Up Arrow to jump Mobile Use the on-screen touch buttons to move and jump
